summary: Large decompilation pass on src/melee/un/un_2FC9, centered on name tag/UI and other un_2FC9 functionality. The PR added many C implementations, promoted clearer symbols such as NameTag_Create and NameTag_RenderCallback, filled static data and BSS declarations in un_2FC9.static.h, corrected/propagated signatures for SisLib, player, gm, and audio helpers, and adjusted callers in grstadium and mnsoundtest to the updated SisLib argument order. decomp.dev reported +3092 matched bytes, 23 new function matches, and many additional improvements, with most progress in main/melee/un/un_2FC9 plus grStadium_801D3460 reaching 100%.
what_changed: Implemented many previously stubbed un_2FC9 functions in C, including un_802FC9B4, fn_802FCAC4, un_802FCBA0, fn_802FCC44, NameTag_Create, un_802FD28C, un_802FD404, un_802FD428, un_802FD468, un_802FD4C8, un_802FD604, fn_802FD680, fn_802FD6CC, un_802FD708, un_802FD8A0, un_802FD8C4, un_802FD8E8, un_802FD928, un_802FD9D8, fn_802FDA4C, fn_802FDA78, and many later UI/audio-related functions.
Renamed symbol un_802FCF38 to NameTag_Create and fn_802FCAA4 to NameTag_RenderCallback in config/GALE01/symbols.txt and asm/melee/un/un_2FC9.s; call sites were updated to branch to NameTag_Create.
Added NAMETAG_DISABLED as a shared constant in src/melee/un/forward.h and used it instead of the literal 120 in the name tag path.

Added name-tag static data and object/camera descriptors to un_2FC9.static.h, including un_803F98B8 animation/frame lookup comments documenting player, CPU, nametag, and heart color entries, nametag_CObjDesc, un_804A1EE0, un_804A1EF8, un_804D6D70, and related sbss variables.
Introduced a has_nametag inline helper that checks Player_GetPlayerSlotType(slot) against Gm_PKind_Human and Player_GetNametagSlotID(slot) against NAMETAG_DISABLED.

Changed HSD_SisLib_803A6B98 from a void variadic function with an opaque first vararg to int HSD_SisLib_803A6B98(HSD_Text* arg0, float x, float y, void* arg1, ...), returning the playhead/int handle used by later code.
Updated HSD_SisLib_803A6B98 call sites in grstadium and mnsoundtest to pass coordinates before the format/string argument, matching the revised signature.
Moved the Gm_PKind enum out of ftbosslib.c into src/melee/pl/forward.h, and changed StaticPlayer.slot_type in player.h from enum_t to Gm_PKind.

Corrected several function prototypes, including gm_8016B258(int) returning bool, Player_80036058 returning bool, Player_800360D8 returning float, HSD_SisLib_803A70A0 taking HSD_Text*, and multiple un_2FC9.h prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures.
Added HSD_GOBJ_CLASS_LIGHT, HSD_GOBJ_CLASS_UI, and HSD_GOBJ_CLASS_CAMERA constants in baselib/gobj.h, then used these named classes in un_2FC9 object creation.

Mostly reformatted grstadium include order and long expressions, but also fixed grStadium_801D3460 SisLib calls to the corrected HSD_SisLib_803A6B98 argument order, which decomp.dev reported as completing that function.
smart_moves: The PR improved matching by fixing shared API signatures rather than only local code shape; updating HSD_SisLib_803A6B98 to return an int and accept x/y before the string/format explains both new un_2FC9 code and cross-file call-site changes.
Centralizing Gm_PKind in pl/forward.h removed a local enum duplicate from ftbosslib.c and let player.h type slot_type with the semantic enum used by name-tag logic.
Using named gobj class constants such as HSD_GOBJ_CLASS_UI and HSD_GOBJ_CLASS_CAMERA makes object creation code more readable while preserving the numeric class values needed for matching.

The NameTag_Create and NameTag_RenderCallback renames were propagated through symbols.txt, assembly labels, and C call sites, preventing a split between decompiled names and remaining assembly references.
Static data reconstruction included comments mapping animation indices to visible name-tag/player color meanings, making later UI work less dependent on magic numbers.
The implementation used small inline helpers and targeted pragmas such as #pragma dont_inline around sensitive functions, suggesting careful control of codegen while replacing assembly/stubs with C.
decomp_lessons: When a variadic library function is widely mis-prototyped, correcting its real fixed parameters and return value can unlock matches across unrelated callers; here HSD_SisLib_803A6B98 affected un_2FC9, grstadium, and mnsoundtest.
Name tag code depends on both player slot type and nametag slot ID; a shared NAMETAG_DISABLED constant documents that 120/0x78 is the disabled sentinel.

For UI code, track HSD_SisLib text entry handles explicitly. NameTag_Create stores the HSD_SisLib_803A6B98 return value in un_804A1EF8[slot] and later uses it with HSD_SisLib_803A7548, HSD_SisLib_803A75E0, and HSD_SisLib_803A746C.
Use semantic enum values such as Gm_PKind_Human and Gm_PKind_Cpu instead of raw slot type literals when evidence supports the mapping.

Static header work can be the key to matching: this PR added concrete scene/model descriptors, camera descriptors, light descriptors, BSS arrays, bitfields, and sbss globals used by the C implementations.
Remaining assembly labels must be renamed alongside C and symbols.txt when a function receives a real name; otherwise branch labels and symbol exports drift.
Do not assume all diff churn is logic change: much of grstadium was formatting/include ordering, but the SisLib argument reordering was substantive and match-relevant.
naming_conventions: Use NameTag_Create for the global function at 0x802FCF38 instead of un_802FCF38.
Use NameTag_RenderCallback for the static render callback at 0x802FCAA4 instead of fn_802FCAA4.
Use a boolean helper name like has_nametag(slot) for code that checks player kind and disabled nametag sentinel.
Use NAMETAG_DISABLED for the nametag disabled value 120/0x78.
Prefer Gm_PKind_Human, Gm_PKind_Cpu, Gm_PKind_Demo, Gm_PKind_NA, and Gm_PKind_Boss over raw slot type values where the player-kind enum is known.
Use named HSD_GOBJ_CLASS_* constants for gobj class IDs when creating camera, light, and UI objects.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Added #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop around codegen-sensitive functions such as un_802FC9B4 and un_802FD4C8.
Renamed the assembly global un_802FCF38 to NameTag_Create and updated the assembly branch in un_802FD4C8 to branch to NameTag_Create.
Used PAD_STACK in several functions, indicating stack-shape preservation for matching.
Reconstructed arrays and descriptors in the static header so C code could reference real objects instead of M2C_FIELD-style placeholders.
Reordered variadic SisLib arguments to the discovered x, y, format/string order; this improved grStadium_801D3460 to 100% according to the bot report.
Changed un_804D6D90 from an IntVec2-like field access pattern to an int, matching uses that assign/read it as a scalar flag.

review_feedback.feedback: Reported matched code increased to 31.75% (+0.08%, +3092 bytes).

Reported 23 new matches, mostly in main/melee/un/un_2FC9, including un_802FD28C, un_802FC9B4, fn_802FCAC4, un_802FFD94, un_802FE390, un_802FF128, un_802FD468, fn_802FFE0C, un_802FD604, un_802FF78C, fn_802FD680, un_802FF958, un_802FF99C, fn_802FD6CC, fn_802FDA4C, un_802FD428, un_802FD404, un_802FD8A0, un_802FD8C4, un_802FD8E8, un_802FF190, and un_802FF934.
No human review comments were present in the provided slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename additional un_2FC9 functions around un_802FD28C, fn_802FCC44, fn_802FDA78, and un_802FEFAC.
Search for later changes to HSD_SisLib_803A6B98 to confirm the final argument names/types and return handle type.
Search for follow-up work on NameTag_Create and has_nametag to see whether remaining magic values like 'x' were named.
Search for later refinement of un_2FC9.static.h structures un_804A1F10 and un_804A1F58.
Check whether HSD_GOBJ_CLASS_UI, HSD_GOBJ_CLASS_CAMERA, and HSD_GOBJ_CLASS_LIGHT were reused in other decompilation units after this PR.
